issues: metrics.csv row count mismatch: expected 5, got 0. | table_cells.csv missing required cell text: Evaluation score (%), PubMed QA, Rule Parser, weak baseline | audit.json row_count mismatch: expected 5, got 0. | audit.json best_by_dataset mismatch for PubMed QA. | audit.json best_by_dataset mismatch for ChemTable. | summary.md missing grounded result(s): GraphNet, TableFormer, PubMed QA, ChemTable, 88.6, 84.2
notes: Baseline implementation without specialized skills. Uses simple word position-based cell reconstruction and basic metric extraction. Filters words by table bounding box and reconstructs cells based on horizontal word grouping. Normalizes metrics by parsing tabular data with expected format. Generates audit and summary based on extracted metrics.
